headline: Target (TGT) Could Gain As Ikea Closes Two Urban Home Planning Stores
summary: Ikea is closing two urban "Plan & Order Point" locations in major US metros, removing a competitor presence in compact home planning formats. This creates an opening for Target, which already offers private label home goods and broad merchandise in urban and near-urban stores. The shift comes as Target's digital and in-store channels have recently shown solid activity, supporting potential incremental traffic from displaced Ikea shoppers. For investors tracking Target, NYSE:TGT, the timing...
